steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is A, $\frac{1}{2}$.

steps.title: Factor the denominator as a perfect square
Solve for x + 5
steps.content: Let u = x + 5. Then 1/u² = 4, so u² = 1/4, giving u = ±1/2.

steps.title: Identify the possible value
steps.content: x + 5 = 1/2 or x + 5 = -1/2. The value 1/2 appears among the choices.
